title: Virginia Advances in ACC Tourney with Victory Over NC State
summary: No. 10 Virginia defeats NC State 81-74 for the third time this season in the ACC Tournament. Malik Thomas scored 16 points.
charlotte_impact: Virginia's continued success in the ACC Tournament impacts their national ranking and tournament prospects.

title: Virginia Secures Victory Against NC State, 81-74
summary: Malik Thomas and Thijs De Ridder lead No. 10 Virginia to an 81-74 victory over NC State.
charlotte_impact: This win propels Virginia further into the ACC Tournament, increasing their chances of winning.

title: Virginia and NC State Face Off in ACC Tournament Quarterfinals
summary: Virginia plays NC State in the quarterfinal round of the 2026 ACC Tournament in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: This game determines which team advances further in the ACC Tournament.

title: NC State vs. Virginia: ACC Tournament Preview
summary: Preview of the NC State Wolfpack versus No. 11 Virginia Cavaliers in the ACC Tournament quarterfinal in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Provides context and predictions for an important ACC Tournament game.

title: Man Charged in Felony Hit-and-Run of 7-Year-Old
summary: Adarias Steffon Oliver faces charges for allegedly hitting a 7-year-old near a school bus stop in University City and fleeing the scene.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers of reckless driving and the importance of school bus safety.

title: Charlotte Weather Forecast: Warmup Expected This Weekend
summary: After a cold Friday, temperatures are expected to rise into the 70s this weekend before a cool down next week.
charlotte_impact: Provides information about upcoming weather changes, allowing residents to plan accordingly.

title: One Hospitalized in Northeast Charlotte House Fire
summary: A house fire on Thornwood Road in northeast Charlotte resulted in one person being hospitalized with non-life-threatening injuries.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the risk of house fires and the importance of fire safety measures.

title: Serious Crash on I-77 North Injures Two
summary: A crash on I-77 North near Uptown resulted in two serious injuries and the closure of a ramp lane for several hours.
charlotte_impact: Demonstrates the potential severity of traffic accidents and their impact on commuters.

title: Union County Officials Search for Missing Woman
summary: Cquila Singleton was last seen on Feb. 26 and last contacted by phone on Feb. 28. Officials are seeking information on her whereabouts.
charlotte_impact: Raises awareness about a missing person case and encourages community involvement in the search.

title: Fatal Crash Reported in East Charlotte
summary: A fatal crash occurred near Plaza Midwood in east Charlotte, according to Medic.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the tragic consequences of traffic accidents and the need for road safety.

title: Body Found in East Charlotte Apartment, Woman Charged
summary: Police discovered a decomposing body in an east Charlotte apartment and have charged a woman in connection with the incident. Victim not yet identified.
charlotte_impact: Indicates a serious crime and raises concerns about public safety in the area.

title: Pussycat Dolls Announce Charlotte Concert
summary: The Pussycat Dolls are bringing their world tour to Charlotte in July 2026, performing at Truliant Amphitheater.
charlotte_impact: Provides information about an upcoming entertainment event in Charlotte.

title: Early Pollen Season Explained in the Carolinas
summary: A cold end to winter followed by a warm March has caused trees to pollinate simultaneously, leading to a severe pollen season.
charlotte_impact: Explains the reasons behind the unusually high pollen levels and their impact on allergy sufferers.

title: Two Found Dead in Waxhaw Neighborhood
summary: Police report the discovery of a man and a woman dead in a Waxhaw neighborhood. Investigators state there is no danger to the public.
charlotte_impact: Reports a concerning incident, though authorities indicate no ongoing threat.

title: Fatal Crash in North Charlotte
summary: One person is dead and another injured in a crash on Statesville Road near Twin Lakes Parkway in north Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Another fatal traffic incident, reinforcing concerns about road safety.
